comment: Template-owned paths, copied wholesale into event repos by sync-from-template.py. 'themed' files are also template-owned but re-branded by apply-theme.py after every sync, so --check skips byte-comparing them. Everything not listed is event-owned.
note_event_owned: config.js, data.js, data-<year>.js, hours.json, place-ids.json, tracking-snapshot.js (baked at wind-down), workers/track/wrangler.toml, CNAME, og-image.*, venmo_qr.png, snapshots/, CLAUDE.md, registry/ (template repo only)
